title: EasySit
body:
# How to install
1) Download the Data Pack
2) Copy the data pack file into your world's `datapacks` folder
3) Use `/reload` command in your world

# How to use
Just use `/trigger sit` command.

# Message setting
In `EasySit\data\easysit\functions\messages`, edit `sit.mcfunction` or `sit_on_air.mcfunction`
